name: Pasadena Independent School District
districtFact: Pasadena ISD serves Pasadena, South Houston, Houston, and surrounding southeast Harris County communities, so districtwide holidays, professional development days, early dismissal dates, and graduation windows are important for families coordinating school, work, childcare, transportation, and travel across the Houston area.

about.title: About Pasadena ISD Academic Calendar
about.content: Pasadena Independent School District serves families in Pasadena, South Houston, parts of Houston, and surrounding southeast Harris County communities. Because the district operates elementary, intermediate, middle, and high school campuses across the region, the Pasadena ISD academic calendar is used by families tracking the school schedule, first student day, holidays, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, teacher workdays, early dismissal dates, grading periods, and graduation windows. Districtwide dates are useful for childcare, transportation, work schedules, and family travel, while campus announcements remain the best source for testing windows, athletics, ceremonies, and school-specific events.

about.title: How to Use This Pasadena ISD Calendar
about.content: This page summarizes Pasadena ISD calendar information in a searchable format. Families should still confirm campus-specific events, testing windows, athletics, and emergency schedule changes through Pasadena ISD and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Pasadena ISD Families
content: Use the first student day, Winter Break, Spring Break, and last student day as the main planning dates for childcare, transportation, family travel, and school activities.
Add early dismissal days separately because they affect pickup, after-school care, and transportation schedules.
Watch student holiday and professional development days because Pasadena ISD uses several single-day closures around long weekends.
Check the official calendar page before booking travel because district calendars can be revised after publication.
Confirm graduation dates with the high school campus because the district calendar lists a graduation window rather than every ceremony time.

compareIntro: Pasadena ISD Calendar Compared With Nearby Districts: compare Pasadena ISD with Houston ISD, Katy ISD, and Cy-Fair ISD calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, and instruction-day counts when available, which helps families compare Pasadena ISD spring break with nearby Houston-area district calendars.

customSections.label: Planning Ahead With the Pasadena ISD Calendar
customSections.content: Families can use the Pasadena ISD calendar to plan vacations, childcare arrangements, transportation, registration, school activities, appointments, and shared family schedules. The district calendar is the right place to check attendance days, no-school days, early dismissal dates, and major breaks, while campus pages should be used for testing, athletics, performances, ceremonies, and other school-specific events.

groups.label: Planning uses
items: Register and prepare before the first student day listed on the district calendar.
Plan family travel during scheduled Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break.
Confirm early dismissal arrangements before December and May early release dates.
Check campus announcements for events that do not appear on the districtwide calendar.

customSections.label: Pasadena ISD District Profile for Calendar Planning
customSections.content: Pasadena ISD is a southeast Harris County school district serving families across Pasadena, South Houston, and nearby Houston-area neighborhoods. Its districtwide academic calendar matters because families often coordinate school dates with Houston-area work schedules, childcare availability, transportation, campus activities, and travel windows. Use this page for districtwide calendar dates, then confirm campus-level events with the assigned school.

groups.label: Local planning context
items: Pasadena ISD calendar dates apply across elementary, intermediate, middle, and high school campuses unless a campus announces a separate event.
Fall Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, early dismissal, and graduation-window dates are the highest-impact planning periods for most families.
Families comparing Houston-area school calendars should check nearby districts separately because first days, spring breaks, and last days do not always match.

customSections.label: Will Pasadena ISD Be Closed Tomorrow?
customSections.content: Pasadena ISD may change schedules because of weather, emergency situations, or district announcements. This calendar page is a planning reference, not a real-time closure feed, so families should check official district channels before traveling or changing childcare plans.

groups.label: Where to check real-time updates
items: Check Pasadena ISD official announcements for weather closures and emergency schedule changes.
Confirm campus notifications for school-specific updates.
Review district updates before traveling when severe weather or emergency conditions are possible.

customSections.label: Pasadena ISD Calendar Update Policy
customSections.content: Pasadena ISD calendars may change because of district revisions, weather closures, emergency situations, or operational updates. MySchoolDates updates calendar information when official district changes are available, but families should confirm urgent schedule changes directly with Pasadena ISD and their assigned campus.

groups.label: Update process
items: Official district calendar sources are checked when Pasadena ISD publishes or revises calendar information.
Important date changes are reviewed before the searchable calendar and calendar import file are updated.
Emergency closures and same-day schedule changes should be confirmed through official Pasadena ISD announcements.

customSections.label: Pasadena ISD Calendar Research & Verification
customSections.content: Reviewed by the MySchoolDates Education Research Team, this page uses Pasadena ISD official calendar sources as its source base. MySchoolDates reviews district calendar records before publishing searchable dates, FAQ answers, and the one-time calendar import file. This page is independently maintained and is not affiliated with Pasadena ISD.

groups.label: Verification process
items: Official Pasadena ISD district calendar sources reviewed.
First day, last day, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, early dismissal, and teacher workday dates compared against source records.
Calendar import file generated from the Pasadena ISD date records used on this page.
Last-minute campus events, weather closures, and emergency changes should still be confirmed with Pasadena ISD and the assigned school.
